chen-zimmerman.name: chen-zimmerman
chen-zimmerman.description: Open Source Asset Pricing dataset (Chen & Zimmerman 2022). 212 firm-level anomaly signals with portfolio returns. Use for cross-sectional calibration, testing anomaly predictions, and constructing characteristic-sorted portfolios.

edgar.name: edgar
edgar.description: Access SEC EDGAR filings, financial statements, and full-text search. Use for corporate finance research — 10-K/10-Q analysis, governance, disclosure, insider trading, institutional holdings.

flex-mining.name: flex-mining
flex-mining.description: Flexible data mining strategies from Chen, Lopez-Lira & Zimmermann. 30,000+ long-short trading strategies from CRSP/Compustat ratios. Use for benchmarking published predictors against data-mined alternatives, testing sufficiency of published literature, and studying the cross-section of expected returns.

fred.name: fred
fred.description: Fetch macroeconomic and financial time series from FRED (Federal Reserve Economic Data). Use when calibrating models to macro moments, testing time-series predictions, or getting risk-free rates, spreads, and macro indicators.

ken-french.name: ken-french
ken-french.description: Download factor returns, portfolio returns, and breakpoints from the Ken French Data Library. Use for asset pricing calibration, computing alphas, and building test assets.

mutual-funds.name: mutual-funds
mutual-funds.description: CRSP Mutual Fund Database + Thomson Reuters holdings via WRDS. Fund returns, NAV, TNA, fees, flows, holdings, and style classifications. Use for mutual fund performance, flow-performance, holdings-based analysis, and fund manager skill.

wrds.name: wrds
wrds.description: Query WRDS (Wharton Research Data Services) for CRSP, Compustat, IBES, options, insider trading, and other financial databases. Use for firm-level stock returns, accounting data, analyst forecasts, and cross-sectional/panel analysis.
